TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Pusong ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taitung Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 284 buwan, 709 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 52% kyan ku 368 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 48% kyan ku 341 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 36%, Puyuma 10%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pusong hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Pusong hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Pusong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pusong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pusong hya' ga Papulu. tay mkyahu' na Pusong hya' ga Sihodingan. tay 'zil na Pusong hya' ga Falangaw. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Pusong ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwsan biru seneng maki 1 pqwsan biru seneng. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pus~ɕoŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taituŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pujuma **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pus~ɕoŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na pus~ɕoŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na pus~ɕoŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pus~ɕoŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pus~ɕoŋ ħjaʔ ɣa papulu. taj mkjaħuʔ na pus~ɕoŋ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕiħo*iŋan. taj ʔzil na pus~ɕoŋ ħjaʔ ɣa *alaŋaw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ pus~ɕoŋ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ maki * pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Pusong ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taitung Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 284 buwan, 709 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 52% kyan ku 368 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 48% kyan ku 341 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 36%, Puyuma 10%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pusong hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Pusong hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Pusong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pusong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pusong hya' ga Papulu. tay mkyahu' na Pusong hya' ga Sihodingan. tay 'zil na Pusong hya' ga Falangaw. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Pusong ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwsan biru seneng maki 1 pqwsan biru seneng. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pus~ɕoŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taituŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pujuma **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pus~ɕoŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na pus~ɕoŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na pus~ɕoŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pus~ɕoŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pus~ɕoŋ ħjaʔ ɣa papulu. taj mkjaħuʔ na pus~ɕoŋ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕiħo*iŋan. taj ʔzil na pus~ɕoŋ ħjaʔ ɣa *alaŋaw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ pus~ɕoŋ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ maki * pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
